payload.reason: Generate managed LICENSE.txt outputs from inherited Skillset license metadata so plugin bundles and skill roots carry deterministic license files and verify catches drift.
Add Workbench fixture instruction examples that exercise the shared instruction frontmatter schema alongside skill and agent contracts.

Refresh docs, generated guidance, and checked-in fixture conventions so agents and adopters see the current `.skillset/cache/`, `.skillset/snapshots/`, and dedicated `skillset/changes/` operational layout.
Track repo-local .skillset operational ignore sentinels so this self-hosted checkout matches the dedicated workspace scaffold while keeping cache, snapshot, and goal packet contents ignored.

Refresh generated Skillset guidance so agents see the 1.0 workspace layouts, remove transitional split-manifest wording from the active skill, and keep fixture documentation aligned with the ordinary workspace shape.

Expand preprocessing variables with nested this references, structured JSON rendering, reusable key-value variable arguments, and parent tree source context for the self-hosted Skillset plugin guidance.
Document the explicit init layout split so authors see nested .skillset/ as the existing-repo default and root skillset.yaml plus skillset/ as the opt-in/root create layout.

Promote the temporary runtime hook helper into first-class `skillset hooks run post-tool-use` and `skillset hooks run stop` commands, and update the self-hosted Claude/Codex runtime hook config plus generated guidance to call the installable CLI surface.
Move operational cache payloads to the XDG-backed repo cache bucket while preserving logical .skillset/cache paths in reports, locks, tests, and generated guidance.

Update setup scaffolds and generated guidance so ordinary and dedicated workspaces create ignored `.skillset/cache/` and `.skillset/snapshots/` operational directories with tracked sentinel ignore files.

Document the new output-safety backup and restore behavior in the self-hosted Skillset guidance so generated agent instructions match SET-19.

Also document the SET-83 doctor and explain render-result JSON surfaces so generated agent instructions match the CLI contract.

Clarify that SET-84 enforces unsupported, lossy, and failed render from structured render results before writes while non-error unsupported destination policies remain reserved.
Move workspace-owned source, plugin guidance, provider islands, and release metadata into the canonical .skillset authoring layout.
Move deterministic test declarations into source-root tests.yaml files, replace assertions with checks, and refresh fixture guidance for the source-root test contract.
Add shared schema contracts for skill, agent, and instruction frontmatter so compiler, Workbench, and generated references validate from the same source.
Stop requiring self-hosted workspaces to pin workspace.cacheKey now that automatic XDG cache keys derive from deterministic host/path checkout identity.
Add the skillset new source-unit scaffolding command and update generated Skillset usage guidance so agents can create repo-scoped skills and agents from the source layout.

Move the self-hosted workspace onto the dedicated `skillset.yaml` and `skillset/` layout, with change state under `skillset/changes/`, while refreshing generated Skillset guidance, fixture instructions, and the generated lockfile contract to use `skillset.lock`.
Move self-hosted source to the canonical .skillset workspace layout and refresh generated Skillset guidance.
Align generated Skillset guidance with the consolidated hooks reference and expose adaptive hook units through lookup.
Document Workbench check and verify guidance in the Claude development skill so generated contributor instructions match the new CLI contract.
Update setup guidance for the unified source scaffold now that init/create create the main .skillset/src source-family directories by default and reserve --include for optional CI only.
Document the richer local `skillset create` bootstrap behavior in the generated Skillset guidance so new source repos are described as README, AGENTS, `.skillset/`, and Git initialized by default.
Refresh self-hosted Skillset guidance for the derive/render/destination terminology cutover: compile.unsupportedDestination, render results, rendered status, and destination wording.

Document the schema-first contract workflow and update self-hosted development guidance so source/config/frontmatter field changes route through @skillset/schema before compiler or Workbench consumers.

Align the self-hosted Skillset plugin and development skills with Git-backed output safety snapshots so generated guidance describes `.skillset/snapshots/` as repo-local recovery state backed by per-run Git object stores.

Move self-hosted Skillset source and the kitchen-sink fixture to the unified .skillset/src layout, add the Git-ref baseline bridge needed for branch-local CI, and refresh public docs away from retired island terminology.
Update self-hosted Skillset guidance for plugin-first generated output under plugins/<plugin>/<target> and root-level marketplace output.
Update self-hosted Skillset guidance for plugin-first generated output under plugins/<plugin>/<target> and root-level marketplace output.
Update self-hosted Skillset guidance for plugin-first generated output under plugins/<plugin>/<target> and root-level marketplace output.
Update self-hosted Skillset guidance for plugin-first generated output under plugins/<plugin>/<target> and root-level marketplace output.
Update self-hosted Skillset guidance for plugin-first generated output under plugins/<plugin>/<target> and root-level marketplace output.
Dogfood the all-provider default by omitting explicit compile targets from the self-hosted workspace so Claude, Codex, and Cursor are built by default.
Update self-hosted Skillset guidance for portable tools policy so generated Claude, Codex, and Cursor plugin docs reference the new tools contract instead of retired tool_intent.
Point self-hosted development guidance at the package-owned core modules while keeping source import in the CLI app.
Teach generated Skillset guidance the consolidated status and lookup command vocabulary.
Complete the 1.0 CLI hard cut across runtime flags, hooks, maintained documentation, fixtures, and generated Skillset guidance.
Align internal Skillset development and ADR guidance with the final check, status, and explain command families so generated agent instructions do not recommend retired CLI routes.
